name: Savory Breakfast Dish, Bacon, Eggs and Cheese
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine cheese, eggs, bacon (cut into 1-inch pieces), onions, cream, salt and pepper. Add mushrooms if desired.
2. Pour mixture into lightly buttered 8-inch square dish.
3. Bake until set.
4. Remove from oven and let stand for a few minutes before serving.
